briefs.title: Proposed: Amenity Pier Covenant for 8351 Fraser Reach Court, Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a covenant — a legal agreement registered on a property title — related to an amenity pier at 8351 Fraser Reach Court in the Riverbend Business Park area near the Fraser River.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the April 14, 2026 council meeting if your business operates near the Fraser Reach Court or Riverbend area.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — Amenity Pier Covenant consideration date
